examples: A radioisotope power source will provide heat and electric power to the rover.
Solar panels will supply power and radioisotope heater units will help it withstand the extreme cold on Mars.
Taking stable iodine as a pill blocks the uptake of the hazardous radioisotope, which has a half-life of 8 days.
The agency will be considering mission concepts that can carry an Advanced Stirling Radioisotope Generator (ASRG).
The suggestion is to use similar radioisotope thermoelectric generators like the one found in the Curiosity rover.
